steps.action: Dance is an integral part of their culture and p with weight transfer through footwork, pivot turn, hold hands, partner opposite, accent beat, grounded.
steps.text: Dance is an integral part of their culture and p with weight transfer through footwork, pivot turn, hold hands, partner opposite, accent beat, grounded.

steps.action: Their traditional occupation is catching snakes
steps.text: Their traditional occupation is catching snakes and trading snake venom.

steps.action: Hence, the dance movements and the costumes of t
steps.text: Hence, the dance movements and the costumes of their community bear a resemblance to those of the serpents.

steps.action: Traditionally, Kalbelia men carried cobras in ca
steps.text: Traditionally, Kalbelia men carried cobras in cane baskets from door to door in villages while their women sang, danced and begged for alms.

steps.action: Kalbelias have traditionally been a fringe group
steps.text: Kalbelias have traditionally been a fringe group in the society, living in spaces outside the village where they reside.

steps.action: Over the generations, the Kalbelias acquired a u
steps.text: Over the generations, the Kalbelias acquired a unique understanding of the local flora and fauna, and are aware of herbal remedies for various diseases which, in turn, is an alternative source of income for them.

steps.action: Since the enactment of the Wildlife Act of 1972,
steps.text: Since the enactment of the Wildlife Act of 1972, the Kalbelias have been pushed out of their traditional profession of snake handling.

steps.action: The dancers are women in flowing black skirts wh
steps.text: The dancers are women in flowing black skirts who dance and twirl, replicating the movements of a serpent.

steps.action: The dancers are tattooed in traditional designs
steps.text: The dancers are tattooed in traditional designs and wear jewelry and garments richly embroidered with small mirrors and silver threads.

steps.action: As the performance progresses, the rhythm become
steps.text: As the performance progresses, the rhythm becomes faster and faster and so does the dance.

steps.action: Kalbelia songs are based on stories taken from f
steps.text: Kalbelia songs are based on stories taken from folklore and mythology and special dances are performed during Holi.

steps.action: These songs and dances are part of an oral tradi
steps.text: These songs and dances are part of an oral tradition that is handed down generations and for which there are neither texts nor any training manuals.

steps.action: In 2010, the Kalbelia folk songs and dances of R
steps.text: In 2010, the Kalbelia folk songs and dances of Rajasthan were declared a part of its Intangible Heritage List by the UNESCO.

steps.action: The Kalbelia are a snake charming tribe from the
steps.text: The Kalbelia are a snake charming tribe from the Thar Desert in Rajasthan, India.

steps.action: Kalbelias are divided into two main groups, the
steps.text: Kalbelias are divided into two main groups, the Daliwal and Mewara.

steps.action: The Kalbelias moved frequently from one place to
steps.text: The Kalbelias moved frequently from one place to another in ancient times.

steps.action: They rear snakes, dogs, hens, horses, donkeys, p
steps.text: They rear snakes, dogs, hens, horses, donkeys, pigs and goats.

steps.action: They are also called Sapera and Jogira, Gattiwal
steps.text: They are also called Sapera and Jogira, Gattiwala and Poogiwara.

steps.action: The largest cluster of the Kalbelias is in Pali
steps.text: The largest cluster of the Kalbelias is in Pali district, followed by significant other groups in Ajmer, Chittorgarh and Udaipur district.

steps.action: They live a nomadic life and belong to the sched
steps.text: They live a nomadic life and belong to the scheduled tribes.

steps.action: They revere the cobra and advocate the non-killi
steps.text: They revere the cobra and advocate the non-killing of such reptiles.

steps.action: In the villages, if a snake inadvertently happen
steps.text: In the villages, if a snake inadvertently happened to enter a home, a Kalbelia would be summoned to catch the serpent and to take it away without killing it.

steps.action: They live in makeshift camps called deras.
steps.text: They live in makeshift camps called deras.

steps.action: The Kalbelias move their deras from one place to
steps.text: The Kalbelias move their deras from one place to another in a circuitous route repeated over time.
